positive: A whimsical, stylized forest scene composition featuring glowing crescent moons, stylized bioluminescent mushrooms, and gentle flowing rivers among silhouetted deciduous trees. The aesthetic should be inspired by deep indigo ink washes meeting soft neon gradient accents. Use a highly detailed line art style combined with solid, flat color blocking and clean silhouettes. The composition must be centrally focused, perfectly balanced, and designed with strong negative space to maximize print contrast on apparel. High depth of field, magical, dreamlike, detailed linework, flat vector art, woodblock print technique, perfect symmetry, celestial flora, magic realism, smooth gradients.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifact, low quality, text, signature, watermark, logo, copyright, anime, realism, hyperrealistic, fuzzy, extra limbs, malformed, bad anatomy, poorly drawn hands
